train.instruction: Write a C function that swaps two integers using pointers.
Write a C function that reverses a string in-place using pointers.
Write a C program that dynamically allocates an array of integers, fills it with values 1 to N, and frees the memory.
Write a C function to implement bubble sort on an integer array.
Define a C struct for a student with name and grade, and write a function to print student details.
Write a C program that reads integers from a file and computes their sum.
Write a C function that performs binary search on a sorted integer array.
Implement a stack using a dynamic array in C with push, pop, and peek operations.
Write a C function that calculates the factorial of a number recursively.
Write a C program that uses malloc and realloc to build a dynamically growing array.
Implement a singly linked list in C with insert and print operations.
Write a C function that finds the maximum element in an array using pointer arithmetic.
Write a C program that copies content from one file to another.
Implement selection sort in C.
Define a C struct for a point in 2D space and write functions to compute distance between two points.
Write a C function that counts the number of words in a string.
Write a C function that implements merge sort.
Write a C program that uses a struct to represent a bank account and implements deposit and withdraw functions.
Write a C function that checks if a string is a palindrome.
Write a C function that computes the GCD of two integers using Euclid's algorithm.
Write a C program that writes student records (name, score) to a binary file and reads them back.
Write a C function to compute the Fibonacci sequence up to N terms using dynamic memory allocation.
Write a C program that implements a queue using two stacks.
Write a C function that searches for a character in a string and returns a pointer to its first occurrence.
Write a C program that counts the frequency of each character in a string.
Write a C function that implements insertion sort.
Write a C function that flattens a 2D array into a 1D array using dynamic memory allocation.
Write a C program that appends data to an existing text file.
Write a C function that implements a doubly linked list with insert and delete operations.
Write a C program that computes the transpose of a matrix.
Write a C function to implement a circular buffer (ring buffer) with put and get operations.
Write a C program that uses fseek and ftell to determine file size.
Write a C function that removes duplicates from a sorted array in-place.
Write a C program that demonstrates pointer to function by implementing a simple calculator.
Write a C function that converts a decimal integer to binary string.
Write a C function that implements quick sort.
Write a C program that reads a CSV file line by line and prints each field.
Write a C function that allocates and initialises a 2D matrix dynamically.
Write a C function that uses a struct to implement a min-heap with insert and extract-min.
Write a C program that creates a simple hash table with separate chaining for string keys.
Write a C function that counts lines, words, and characters in a file (like wc).
Write a C function that implements binary tree insertion and in-order traversal.
Write a C function that multiplies two matrices and returns the result.
Write a C function that reads a line from stdin safely without buffer overflow.
Write a C program that demonstrates the use of void pointers for a generic swap function.
Write a C function that implements a simple string tokenizer.
Write a C program that uses structs and file I/O to implement a simple contact book.
Write a C function that computes prime numbers up to N using the Sieve of Eratosthenes.
Write a C program that demonstrates multi-level pointer dereferencing.
Write a C function that implements linear search and returns the index of the target.

eval.instruction: Write a C function that reverses a singly linked list.
Write a C function that uses malloc to create and return a copy of a string.
Write a C program that writes an array of integers to a text file, one per line, then reads them back and prints their sum.
Write a C function that searches a binary search tree for a given value and returns 1 if found.
Write a C function that uses pointer arithmetic to compute the dot product of two float arrays.
Write a C program that demonstrates struct with a self-referential pointer to implement a tree node.
Write a C function that counts the number of set bits (1s) in an integer.
Write a C function that allocates a 3D array dynamically and initialises all elements to zero.
Write a C function that merges two sorted linked lists into one sorted linked list.
Write a C program that reads a text file and prints the number of lines, words, and bytes using fread.
